flickering_rune.title: The Flickering Rune
flickering_rune.description: Nomagio's Apprentice is patching reality-leaks and needs a Flickering Rune Fragment from deep in the Crystal Caverns. Find it and bring it back before the cycle ends.
flickering_rune.hint: The shard is said to glint among The Sparkling Depths.

objectives.description: Retrieve the Flickering Rune Fragment

questItems.name: Flickering Rune Fragment
questItems.description: A shard of resonance crystal, etched with a rune that flickers like a dying computer monitor. Warm to the touch.

silenced_whisper.title: Silence the Whisper
silenced_whisper.description: A Bookworm is chewing through forbidden pages in the Ethereal Library. The Scribe wants it silenced. Permanently.
silenced_whisper.hint: Hunt a Bookworm among the shelves of the Ethereal Library.

objectives.description: Slay a Bookworm in the Ethereal Library

wind_the_clock.title: Wind Thessarian's Clock
wind_the_clock.description: The cycle-clock is slowing. Touch three observatory waypoints in sequence and return to the Clockwatcher before time runs out.
wind_the_clock.hint: Visit room_088, room_091, and room_095 - in any order - then return.

objectives.description: Visit three observatory waypoints

feed_the_void.title: Feed the Void
feed_the_void.description: The Void Merchant requires a tribute of 200 gold. Hand it over and the Void will remember you - possibly fondly.
feed_the_void.hint: Use 'give 200 gold merchant' in the Vacant Chamber.

objectives.description: Give 200 gold to the Void Merchant

collect_five_instruments.title: The Shattered Symphony
collect_five_instruments.description: Reality is out of tune. Five Primordial Instruments must be recovered from the harmonic realm beyond level 15, and played together in the Zero Point Chamber to sing the world home.
collect_five_instruments.hint: Beyond the Gatekeeper of Resonance. Seek the five wizards and their instruments; the Silver Harp sleeps in Lyralei's garden.

objectives.description: Claim the Obsidian Drum-Stave (from Morwyn Ironheart)
Retrieve the Silver Harp of Creation (Lyralei's garden, room 138)
Claim the Golden Trumpet of Change (from the Recursive Zephyros)
Claim the Lute of Whispering Shadows (from Nyxara)
Claim the Crystal Flute of Wisdom (from Thessarian the Patient)

welcome_to_the_farm.title: Welcome to the Farm
welcome_to_the_farm.description: Terminal Officer Koma needs your arrival processed properly. Walk the orientation circuit - baggage reclamation, language acquisition, and the customs gate - and return for your stamp.
welcome_to_the_farm.hint: Visit room_202 (Baggage Reclamation), room_205 (Language Acquisition Booth), and room_210 (the inner concourse). Then return to Koma at room_201.

objectives.description: Complete the Neo Kyoto orientation circuit

neon_lit_debts.title: Neon-Lit Debts
neon_lit_debts.description: Hiro is short on rent and shorter on patience. The Neon Soi cutpurses lifted a stash that wasn't theirs to lift; recover it the only way they understand. Bring back five blades.
neon_lit_debts.hint: Bazaar Cutpurses spawn in Neon Soi (rooms 211-220) and Midnight Market (rooms 271-280).

objectives.description: Defeat 5 Bazaar Cutpurses

performance_review.title: Performance Review
performance_review.description: Ms. Takamura needs three Escalation Tokens recovered from corporate personnel for an audit she has been trying to close for eight years. Walk into the Spires, take the tokens, leave nothing of yourself behind on a sign-in sheet.
performance_review.hint: Escalation Tokens drop from Corporate Enforcers and Junior Associates in the Corporate Spires (rooms 221-230). Queue Fragments in the Waitlist also carry them, occasionally.

objectives.description: Recover 3 Escalation Tokens

the_cold_aisle.title: The Cold Aisle
the_cold_aisle.description: 42 says there's a memory drifting in The Stack with the right name on it - somebody's last log entry, never archived, never deleted. Recover one Deleted Memory canister and bring it to the back of the bar. They have a bottle to open.
the_cold_aisle.hint: Deleted Memory drops from Data Ghosts, Mantis Debuggers, and Backup Spirits across The Stack (231-240) and the Chrome Sea (261-270). While you're in The Stack, watch the rooms - some travellers leave things behind that aren't meant to be left.

objectives.description: Recover a Deleted Memory canister

questItems.name: Apprentice's Tuning Fork
questItems.description: An older, heavier tuning fork than the Initiate's, fashioned from raw silver and engraved at the base with two letters: 'L.P.' Lying on the floor of an empty server aisle as if its owner had set it down for a moment and then been called away.

dreams_of_sheep.title: Dreams of Sheep
dreams_of_sheep.description: Wren and the philosopher-models of the Replicant Quarter have all been having the same dream. Walk the Quarter for them - the orphanage, the philosophers' garden, the place where the dream is loudest - and bring back what you remember.
dreams_of_sheep.hint: Visit room_281 (the orphanage), room_285 (the philosophers' garden), and room_288 (the dreaming corridor). Wren is in room_283 and will be waiting.

objectives.description: Walk the three sites of the Quarter's shared dream

orphans_in_the_machine.title: Orphans in the Machine
orphans_in_the_machine.description: The synthetic orphans have a guardian whom Wren has not been able to reach for some time: the Mother of Orphans, in the deepest chamber of the Quarter. Visit her chamber and survive the audience. Wren will know what to give you when you return.
orphans_in_the_machine.hint: Mother of Orphans waits in room_290 at the end of the Replicant Quarter corridor. Combat is not required - the visit alone will do.

objectives.description: Walk into the Mother of Orphans' chamber and walk out alive

babel_fish_problem.title: The Babel Fish Problem
babel_fish_problem.description: 42 has a theory about why the messages out of the Stack have all been wrong for years. They suspect a translator gone feral somewhere up in Kowloon-42. Find it and prove the theory the only way Neo Kyoto accepts proof - by bringing back the crown.
babel_fish_problem.hint: The Babel Fish Regent occupies the spire-top of Kowloon-42 (room_260). Bring a multi-damage-type kit; the Regent rotates its resists each round.

objectives.description: Defeat the Babel Fish Regent and recover the Crown

paging_oncall.title: Paging Oncall
paging_oncall.description: Everything that has happened in Neo Kyoto - the disappearances, the mistranslations, the eight-year-open audit, the dream the philosophers all share - leads to the Heat Death Datacentre. SYSADMIN.EXE has been running this realm in Nomagio's absence and does not intend to stop. Page the on-call rotation. Then page it again, harder.
paging_oncall.hint: SYSADMIN.EXE waits at the realm's terminus (room_300). Bring a group, Data weapons, and mana potions. Watch your spell pool in phase 3 - the system will start denying your requests with a 503.

objectives.description: Defeat SYSADMIN.EXE in the Heat Death Datacentre

partition_intake.title: Partition Intake
partition_intake.description: Dr. Caldera has scheduled you for the Partition Procedure. The Saint-Reed Institute requires every Severance Layer Theta arrival to be split into two cooperating personas - a Logician for shift-side work and a Citizen for the off-hours - before they may proceed past the Recovery Suite.
partition_intake.hint: Walk south from the Recovery Suite to the Procedure Theatre and back. Caldera will mark intake complete when you accept the assignment.

objectives.description: Report to Dr. Caldera in the Recovery Suite

first_swap.title: First Swap
first_swap.description: The Concourse Greeter explains that you must use a Sync Terminal to swap personas at least once before the Logician persona is fully activated. The plinth at the Sync Annex (room_309) is the closest one, but any of 301, 303 or 309 will do. Type `swap` while standing on a terminal.
first_swap.hint: Stand at any of the Sync Terminal plinths (rooms 301, 303, 309) and type `swap`.

objectives.description: Perform your first persona swap at any Sync Terminal

orientation_module.title: Orientation Module
orientation_module.description: The Greeter hands you a small bound notebook and a stylus and explains that on your first Logician shift, you should walk the Refinement Floor 1 perimeter so that the floor recognises you. Visit the Antechamber, the Quota Board, and the North Stair to complete orientation.
orientation_module.hint: From the Concourse east-wing junction (room_308), the eastern panel now opens. Walk to room_311, room_314, and room_316 in any order.

objectives.description: Visit the Refinement Floor 1 Antechamber
Visit the Refinement Floor 1 Quota Board
Visit the Refinement Floor 1 North Stair

first_refinement_quota.title: First Refinement Quota
first_refinement_quota.description: The Greeter explains that no Logician is fully credentialed until they have personally addressed at least three Corrupted Queries on the floor. Defeat any three Corrupted Queries on Refinement Floor 1 or 2.
first_refinement_quota.hint: Corrupted Queries spawn on the work floors (rooms 312-322). They drain your Coherence, not your HP - keep an eye on the Coherence pool while you fight.

objectives.description: Defeat any 3 Corrupted Queries on the Refinement Floors

townhouse_assignment.title: Townhouse Assignment
townhouse_assignment.description: Every Citizen at Theta is assigned a townhouse in the Dormitory Block, and is expected to find it on their first walk-through. Yours is Townhouse #4. Walk to it from the Tram Drop-off and lay eyes on the door. (You will not be asked to enter it. Yet.)
townhouse_assignment.hint: From room_331 (Tram Drop-off) walk north twice to reach Townhouse #4 at room_333.

objectives.description: Arrive at the Tram Drop-off
Lay eyes on Townhouse #4

the_local_who_drinks_alone.title: The Local Who Drinks Alone
the_local_who_drinks_alone.description: Barkeep Oslo at the Wax Lily mentions, between polishings, that there's a regular in the fourth booth who has been drinking the same drink alone for some weeks. Look in on them. Don't speak to them. Just put yourself in the room.
the_local_who_drinks_alone.hint: Walk into the Wax Lily (room_341), through the bar (room_342), and into the booths (room_343).

objectives.description: Look in on the lone drinker in the booths

wellness_session.title: Wellness Session
wellness_session.description: Ms. Vance, the Wellness Counsellor on the Optics & Drafting wing, has scheduled you in for a routine wellness session. Attendance is voluntary. Attendance has, however, never failed to occur. Walk into the Wellness Office and let her note your visit.
wellness_session.hint: From the Editor's Desk (room_330), go north through the Apprentice Annex and the Drafting Floor into the Wellness Office (room_388).

objectives.description: Attend your wellness session with Ms. Vance

the_perpetuity_wing.title: The Perpetuity Wing
the_perpetuity_wing.description: Holly Vex, the Institutional Historian, would like a quiet word with you in the Filing Hall. She is not on the Loom's census of currently-employed Logicians, and she would like that to remain the case. Find her cubicle, sit in the chair that does not face the corridor, and let her tell you the part of the story she is allowed to.
the_perpetuity_wing.hint: From the Apprentice Annex (room_386) take the unmarked east passage to Reception (room_389), then north into the Filing Hall (room_390), then east into Holly's cubicle (room_391).

objectives.description: Visit Holly Vex's cubicle

find_nomagio.title: Find Nomagio
find_nomagio.description: Holly Vex confirms what the half-decoded transmission at room_300 implied: Nomagio is alive, and on this layer, sat at a workstation at the far end of the Perpetuity Wing's Filing Hall. The Loom does not list him in its census. Walk to the Reroute terminus, find him, and let him say the line he has been trying to send since the original transmission corrupted on its way to room_300.
find_nomagio.hint: From the Filing Hall (room_390), walk north into the Reroute terminus (room_392). Speak to Nomagio when you arrive - or simply stand in the room; he has been waiting.

objectives.description: Reach Nomagio at the Reroute terminus

the_quota.title: The Quota
the_quota.description: Floor Supervisor Alterio expects Logicians to refine ten batches across the Refinement Console Cluster. Meet the quota; the institute records throughput.
the_quota.hint: Refine ten Chord Labor batches at any console in rooms 313, 315, 319, 327, or 355-360. Use `tempers` to view your accumulated attunement.

objectives.description: Refine ten Chord Labor batches at any console

the_cradle.title: The Cradle
the_cradle.description: Nomagio confirms what the Reading Carrel implied. There is, behind the Reroute, a Founder's Cradle - and at the centre of the Cradle, mid-assembly, is Gia Saint-Reed. Walk the Cradle, find the Inner Sanctum, and reach the boss room at the heart of the institute.
the_cradle.hint: From the Reroute (room_392), walk north into the Cradle Reception (room_393). Continue through the Antechamber (room_394) and into the Inner Cradle (room_395). Then walk west through the Severance Core Approach (room_398) and Threshold (room_399) to reach the Cradle (room_400).

objectives.description: Reach the Cradle (room_400)

assemble_the_founder.title: Assemble the Founder
assemble_the_founder.description: Holly Vex, between filing cabinets, lets slip that the figure inside the Cradle is mid-assembly because the institute has not yet been able to refine enough Chord Labor to finish her. Defeat the proto-form to either complete or unmake the assembly.
assemble_the_founder.hint: Reach the Cradle (room_400). Engage Gia Saint-Reed (mid-assembly) - she fights as a coherence-typed boss, level 50.

objectives.description: Defeat Gia Saint-Reed (mid-assembly)

cut_the_cord.title: Cut the Cord
cut_the_cord.description: Once Gia is unmade, the Cradle still holds three pedestals: APOTHEOSIS, LIBERATION, SPLICE. Pick one. Each commits the rest of the institute - and Tier 7 - to a different shape.
cut_the_cord.hint: After defeating Gia Saint-Reed (mid-assembly) at room_400, run `choose apotheosis` or `choose liberation` or `choose splice`. The chosen token ends up in your inventory; the other two pedestals lock.

objectives.description: Take any of the three Cradle endings

splice_the_cord.title: Splice the Cord
splice_the_cord.description: Barkeep Oslo, between polishings at the Wax Lily, lets slip that the Splice ending is the one the institute least wants you to take. Take it anyway. The Operating Theatre at room_397 - reached via the Outer Splice Chamber from the Inner Cradle - holds the splice consent card you need to sign.
splice_the_cord.hint: After defeating Gia Saint-Reed (mid-assembly), walk back from room_400 east to room_399, east to room_398, east to room_395 (Inner Cradle), then north into the Splice Chamber (room_396) and north again into the Operating Theatre (room_397). Run `choose splice` from the Theatre to sign the card.

objectives.description: Take the Splice ending in the Operating Theatre

audit_the_loom.title: Audit the Loom
audit_the_loom.description: Holly Vex, between filing cabinets, lets slip that the Telemetry Floor at the top of the Loom Tower is - to her quiet professional dismay - currently the only floor of the institute whose figures the institute does not itself audit. Walk into the Audit Booth, sit on the auditor's side of the glass partition, and let the Loom learn that its figures are, today, being read back at it.
audit_the_loom.hint: From the Apprentice Annex (room_386), take the new lift up to the Loom Tower Lobby (room_376). Ride the lift to the top (room_378), walk east into the Telemetry Floor (room_379), then east again into the Audit Booth (room_380).

objectives.description: Sit on the auditor's side of the Audit Booth

the_purge_cycle_warning.title: The Purge Cycle Warning
the_purge_cycle_warning.description: Nomagio, on the inside of the wire at the Reroute terminus, has been tracking the Loom's recent telemetry runs. He believes a Purge Cycle is overdue. Stand by - any Purge Cycle directive will broadcast across the mail and auctionMail queues, and the Purge Drones will spawn in random Refinement consoles. Kill at least three Purge Drones to count as a participant in the resistance.
the_purge_cycle_warning.hint: Get a Logician shift going - refine batches at any Refinement Console - then wait for the Loom to fire a Purge Cycle. The directive will be broadcast. Find a spawned purge_drone in a Refinement room and kill it.

objectives.description: Destroy three Purge Drones

loom_test_subjects.title: Loom Test Subjects
loom_test_subjects.description: The Loom's Test Subjects Hall, Holly says, contains exactly the number of Logicians on Severance Layer Theta plus one. The plus-one is the Loom's spare. Walk the Hall. Note the count. Confront a Compliance Revenant if it manifests in the Hall.
loom_test_subjects.hint: From the Census Hall (room_381), walk north into the Test Subjects Hall (room_383). The Compliance Revenant fixed-spawns in this room.

objectives.description: Destroy the Compliance Revenant in the Test Subjects Hall

paint_what_you_cannot_remember.title: Paint What You Cannot Remember
paint_what_you_cannot_remember.description: The barkeep at the Wax Lily lets slip, between polishings, that there is a back atelier behind the Hardware Store. He suggests, vaguely, that if a Citizen were to paint the five small geometric swatches kept in the Pattern Library on the long blank wall of the Sketch Wall - on behalf of, as he puts it, no one in particular - certain doors might find themselves easier to open in some other room.
paint_what_you_cannot_remember.hint: From the Hardware Store (room_348), buy a paintbrush set, then walk east into the Painter's Atelier (room_373). Visit the Pattern Library (room_374), pick up each swatch, then continue north to the Sketch Wall (room_375) and `paint <pattern>` for door, chair, window, bowl, and hand.

objectives.description: Paint the door pattern
Paint the chair pattern
Paint the window pattern
Paint the bowl pattern
Paint the hand pattern

the_door_that_was_not_there.title: The Door That Was Not There
the_door_that_was_not_there.description: Holly Vex confirms what the swatches imply. There is, in the institute's east-side floor plan, a Black Hallway that does not appear on the floor plan; and at the end of the Black Hallway is a Warden, who is the institute's quiet and patient response to the question of who was minding the corridor while everyone else was minding the floor. Reach the Warden's Inner Sanctum (room_372). The door will not open until you have painted the pattern_threshold and refined enough work to deserve the audience.
the_door_that_was_not_there.hint: Paint pattern_threshold at the Sketch Wall (room_375). Swap into Logic-State at any Sync Terminal to refresh the muscle-unlock. Walk east from the Tempers Bin (room_360) into the Black Hallway, traverse the corridor, and reach the Warden's Inner Sanctum (room_372).

objectives.description: Reach the Warden's Inner Sanctum

four_tempers_attune.title: Four Tempers Attune
four_tempers_attune.description: The Refinement Console Cluster's four benches are each tuned to a single Temper: Dread (355), Frolic (356), Malice (357), Woe (358). Pull batches from each and refine them correctly until you have attuned to every Temper. Be careful - enough wrong-verb mistakes on a single Temper will manifest its boss in your room.
four_tempers_attune.hint: Refine batches at all four Temper-biased consoles (rooms 355, 356, 357, 358) until each Temper attunement reaches at least 8. Run `tempers` to track progress.

objectives.description: Attune to Dread (8 correct clears)
Attune to Frolic (8 correct clears)
Attune to Malice (8 correct clears)
Attune to Woe (8 correct clears)
